Entry.JapaneseText: 今日も今日とて警邏任務とは、 お前も生真面目なこったな
Entry.EnglishText: Day after day and here you are, with yet another patrol mission. You're overly serious, too, huh.

Entry.JapaneseText: うるさい。 僕に構うな
まぁそう言うなって。 ずっと根詰めっぱなしで疲れたろうから ちょいと差し入れを、な
Entry.EnglishText: Well, don't say that. You must be pushing yourself to near exhaustion at this point. I brought you something small.
Entry.Notes: Yuri uses "maa" here and he regularly uses ma/maa. This is one thing I will never budge on as far as how I translate it, because it's an intentional part of his character. Since he repeats the same words, I get that across by keeping them constant in tl. I realize in most cases it would be more like "Now now, don't say that", but I'm very firm on how I handle Yuri's tls for very specific reasons. It's very literally a "him" thing, as much as Shing's catchphrase is for him. If he uses those specific words, no matter how I tl it, it will always include those words.

Entry.JapaneseText: ほら、クレープだ。 食えよ
Entry.EnglishText: Here, it's a crepe. Eat it.

Entry.JapaneseText: な、こ、これは？ お前が作ったのか？
Entry.EnglishText: Wha--... Th-This...? Did you make this?

Entry.JapaneseText: なんだっていいだろ。 どうなんだ？ 食うのか、食わねぇのか
Entry.EnglishText: Anything should be fine according to you, right? So? Are you gonna eat it? You not gonna eat it?

Entry.JapaneseText: ……ふん。 食材を無駄にするわけにはいかないからな。 食ってやる
Entry.EnglishText: ...Hmph. I can't just let food go to waste. I'll eat it.

Entry.JapaneseText: 馬鹿な！？ クレープに……ミソがついている？
Entry.EnglishText: It can't be! There's miso on the crepe?

Entry.JapaneseText: 今の女が、やりやがったのか！？
Entry.EnglishText: Did that woman just now do this?!

Entry.JapaneseText: ……許せん。 周辺を封鎖しろ！ クレープを汚した犯人を許すな！！
Entry.EnglishText: ...Unforgiveable. Blockade the area! We will not let this criminal get away with defiling this crepe!!
